历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for science (physics category) was approximately 5819 → 6827 → 6609 → 23305 → 15809. In 2024, there was an abnormal significant drop (23305th), and in 2025, it rebounded to 15809th, with drastic fluctuations in the past two years. The 2025 baseline is about 15809th. The enrollment plan for this university in Yunnan's science (physics category) was 4 in 2021 → 7 in 2022 → 26 in 2023 → 40 in 2024 → 53 in 2025, showing continuous significant expansion. The 2026 plan is 53, unchanged from 2025, pausing the expansion trend, with slightly increased competition pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project, Double First-Class; on the Soft Science main ranking, it rose from 46th in 2021 to 53rd in 2026, with a steady upward trend in recent years, continuously enhancing comprehensive strength. The 2026 reputation evaluation is somewhat positive (an 81-year-old doctoral graduate gained widespread attention, demonstrating lifelong learning spirit). Douyin popularity is average (89th overall, comprehensive popularity about 216,000), with short video exposure at a medium-low level, showing no obvious application heat signal. No recent enrollment gaps. Education A+, Chinese History A-, Psychology A-, Political Science A-, Marxist Theory A-, totaling 5 A-class disciplines, with Education being an A+ top discipline, strongly attracting normal university applicants.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer science, electronic information/communication, electrical engineering, and other popular science majors continue to be highly recommended, attracting high-scoring applicants. The total number of Yunnan Province's 2026 Gaokao examinees is about 377,900, a significant increase of about 32% compared to the combined total of about 285,700 for history and physics categories in 2025, sharply intensifying competition. Central China Normal University is located in Wuhan, Hubei, with no special regional preference in Yunnan. Its enrollment proportion in Yunnan is about 0.9%–1.1% (2021–2025), a normal scale for out-of-province enrollment.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the significant rebound of the 2025 ranking to 15809th, the unchanged 2026 enrollment plan, the substantial increase of about 32% in the number of local examinees, and the sustained high popularity of popular science majors (computer/electronic information) attracting competition, it is expected that competition in 2026 will be slightly more intense than in 2025, with a minor backward shift in ranking. The predicted minimum ranking is about 16009th, with a range of 15509–16509th.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 15509–16509, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as safety. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit (e.g., within 15500), you can focus on aiming for popular majors like Computer Science and Electronic Information. If your ranking is near the upper limit (around 16500), it is advisable to prioritize Tier 3 majors as safety, choosing Public Administration, Information Resource Management, etc., for a stable selection.

The 2026 plan is 23, a further decrease of 1 (-4.2%) from 2025, with two consecutive years of slight enrollment reduction, slightly intensifying competition.

学校层次与声誉.text: 211, Double First-Class; the Soft Science main ranking has gradually risen from 46th in 2021 to 53rd in 2026, with stable improvement in recent years and continuously enhanced comprehensive strength. The reputation evaluation in 2026 is relatively positive (an 81-year-old doctoral graduate gained widespread attention, demonstrating lifelong learning spirit). 预测结论.text: Considering the significant backward shift of the 2025 ranking to 2020, the continued slight enrollment reduction in 2026 (-4.2%), a notable increase of about 32% in the total number of local candidates, and a positive university reputation, competition in 2026 is expected to be slightly more intense than in 2025, with the ranking continuing to shift backward slightly.
